rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in component types, not implementations, for assumptions and guarantees
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are resolvable within the visible scope of the annex
generic_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are declared or visible in the current scope
Validate that AGREE expressions have proper boolean types on both sides of '=>' operators
Remove invalid AGREE clauses when referenced identifiers cannot be resolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in 'annex agree {** ... **};' blocks
Assumptions and guarantees must be declared in component types, not implementations
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Adding new architecture elements to fix unresolved references; instead, resolve or remove invalid clauses
Placing assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
